content.problemStatement: Write a C program that takes input for an array of 5 integers and calculates the sum of all elements in the array. Print the sum.

solution.approach: The solution approach involves taking input for an array of 5 integers, calculating the sum of all elements in the array, and then printing the sum.

code.Python3:
numbers = [int(input()) for _ in range(5)]
sum_of_numbers = sum(numbers)
print(sum_of_numbers)
